title: boechera howellii
intro: Boechera howellii, also known as Howell's rockcress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Boechera howellii include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antioxidant properties. Boechera howellii can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and applications.
